context: You just lost 20 000$ investing in the stock market yesterday. Although you knew that was a risk you want that money back somehow.

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to J — we repeated that we'd watch each other's backs and the rapport felt genuine and steady, so I trust them most going in. G was another strong connection; our quiet-alliance plan and simple signals (nod for watch, nose-touch for go) felt practical and reliable. C was polite and supportive but more distant and transactional, so they’re the person I felt least connected to before the game.

I made explicit agreements with J to look out for one another and with G to trade observations and use discreet signals to coordinate. I trust J the most and generally trust G as an ally; I don’t have anyone I specifically distrust yet, but I’ll stay cautious and keep reading people as the game unfolds.
